title: iris spuria subsp. dierinckii
intro: Iris spuria subsp. dierinckii, also known as a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Iris spuria plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the iris family. The medicinal properties of Iris spuria subsp. dierinckii lie in its root, which has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried and used in tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal properties.
